_note: Twelve-row obligations register seed for the Charity Onboarding Room (CSO-002 §4 register). The CSO-002 source document is not held in this repository; rows are authored to the AILANE-CC-BRIEF-CSO-ROOM-WEB-001 parameters (annual return first due 1 February 2027) and are to be verified by the Director at provisioning. Countdown chips are computed client-side from first_due.

register.obligation: Annual return to the Charity Commission
register.derivation: Registered charities must complete an annual return within ten months of the financial year end (31 March 2026).
The trustees' annual report and accounts accompany the annual return for the same financial year.
Accounts above the audit/examination thresholds need independent examination before filing — booked ahead of the February deadline.

register.obligation: Trustee declarations and conflicts register refresh
register.derivation: Trustees re-confirm eligibility and declare interests on a regular cycle under the governing document and Commission guidance.
The safeguarding policy is reviewed at least annually against current Charity Commission safeguarding expectations.

register.obligation: DBS check refresh for regulated roles
register.derivation: Disclosure checks for trustees, staff and volunteers in regulated activity are refreshed on a rolling cycle.
Trustees maintain a live route to report serious incidents to the Commission promptly; readiness is reviewed quarterly.
register.provenance: CSO-002 §4 · Charity Commission serious incident regime

register.derivation: The charity's ICO registration and data protection fee renew annually from the registration date held in the charity's records.
register.provenance: CSO-002 §4 · Data Protection (Charges and Information) Regulations 2018

register.obligation: Gift Aid claim and records cycle
register.derivation: Gift Aid claims are prepared on a quarterly cycle with supporting declarations retained for HMRC.
Registration with the Fundraising Regulator and the associated levy renew annually for charities that fundraise from the public.
register.provenance: CSO-002 §4 · Charities (Protection and Social Investment) Act 2016 s.13

register.derivation: Employers re-enrol eligible staff and re-declare compliance to The Pensions Regulator on the triennial cycle from the original staging date.

register.obligation: Employment contracts and written particulars review
register.derivation: Written statements of particulars for staff are reviewed annually so they stay current with Employment Rights Act requirements.
